description: The 10-15s claim is wrong for {1,2} (88.4s) and {1,3} (18.0s). Only k>=4 fits 10-11s. The per-pair timing table in issue 1's fix replaces this claim. Also fix frontmatter scaling field from 'k^(-3 to -4)' to the correct regression.
